subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of utterance from the cup of his Lord's bounty, and hath turned unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن شرب رحیق البیان من کاس عطاء ربه و اقبل الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
